working.title: ADX+MOM20 Gate — Confirmed
working.desc: Upgraded from VIX20+MOM20. PSR=1.000, fire rate 17% (was 37%), OOS CAGR +14.6% (was +7.4%). Full portfolio: CAGR +21.6%, Sharpe 1.18, MaxDD −25.9%, ₹82L. Gate-off now earns risk-free (was 1× — hidden bug fixed).

working.title: Weekly Directional ADX33
working.desc: New signal set (RSI5+EMA200+crude+PCR+US10Y) with ADX≥33 gate. Sharpe held IS→OOS. Under surveillance — need 2–3 more years to confirm.

working.title: Sector RS Rate-Shock Gate
working.desc: Replaced overfit yield-level rule (4.2%) with sector-RS gate: IT 20d underperformance + rate acceleration. Fires 46% of 2022, 0% of 2023, 6.5% of 2024.

working.title: Straddle LIVE — June 1 Entry
working.desc: First paper straddle active. Entry Jun 1, spot 23,560, premium 946 pts (4.01%). Expiry Jun 25. 7-gate check: all passed at entry (VIX, FII, VRP=+15.12, ATR, rate, mom_bleed, calendar). Gates synced with gate_monitor.py — now 7 gates (was 5).

working.title: Paper Trader Live
working.desc: Running since 2026-05-30. Sector gate FLAT (ADX avg 0.32 < 0.40 — choppy regime, earning risk-free). Straddle active. Options idle (ADX < 33).

failed.title: Weekly Dir S5 (no ADX)
failed.desc: Regime-specific: built on 2019–2021 low-vol market structure. IS Sharpe 1.58 → OOS -0.91. 157% IS→OOS collapse. Retired.

failed.title: Causal Signal Filters
failed.desc: VIX+causal Sharpe -0.52 vs VIX+MOM20 +1.08. 368 signals tested — only 11 pass p<0.05 (3% hit rate). Causal filters actively hurt performance. Dropped.

failed.title: Sector Rotation Exclusions
failed.desc: Dropping IT/pharma in rate shock trained on single 2022 episode. Actual 2022 performance: rotation 4.6% vs baseline 6.6%. Exclusion logic underperformed buy-and-hold.

failed.title: 576-Parameter Grid
failed.desc: Straddle param grid CV=126% across combinations. Best combos have 9 trades — statistically meaningless. No IS/OOS declaration during search. Shelved.

failed.title: No Bear/Rate-Shock Strategy
failed.desc: In rate-shock (2022): best strategy was DUAL_MOM at Sharpe 0.82 — barely above cash. In prolonged bear (china crash 2015): everything collapses, best was -0.95. Gap not filled.

risks.title: Pre-2017 Data Quality
risks.desc: NSE options 80–90% zero-volume pre-2017. Straddle backtest uses theoretical settle prices — unrealisable fills. Pre-2017 results overstate true edge by unknown amount.

risks.title: GMM Feature Bug (Fixed)
risks.desc: NIFTY sector rows had null vol_regime/vix_level_z. drop_duplicates kept null rows, degrading GMM training silently. Fixed: filter to nsebank rows before dedup.

risks.title: ADX Starved of Entries
risks.desc: ADX≥33 gate fires ~7×/yr in 2024–2026 vs ~18×/yr in 2022–23. Market structure change (low-ADX grinding) means weekly directional rarely gets a valid entry window.

risks.title: FII Data Gap Q1-2023
risks.desc: FII historical data starts 2023-04-03 but FII gate activates 2023-01-01. Fixed via fillna→pass for NaN. No longer blocks Jan–Mar 2023 trades incorrectly.

risks.title: No Live Execution
risks.desc: All results paper-only. Live slippage, margin, and execution risk not captured. Paper validation must run 18–24 months before any live capital.

next.title: Bear / Rate-Shock Strategy
next.desc: Biggest gap: no validated strategy survives prolonged bear. DUAL_MOM performed best in 2022 (Sh=0.82) — needs proper IS/OOS validation and regime-conditional routing.

next.title: Straddle Paper Phase
next.desc: Rate shock cleared. Gates passing. Begin paper straddle July 6, 2026. Track 18–24 months at 5% Kelly. Document all gate decisions and exit reasons.

next.title: MOM20 OOS Validation
next.desc: VIX+MOM20 Sharpe 1.08 IS (2015–2022). No explicit OOS test in 2023+. Needs formal walk-forward test before adding to live system.

next.title: ADX33 Sample Build-Up
next.desc: Weekly directional ADX33 variant is promising (Sharpe 2.06 OOS) but n=39 trades. Need 2–3 years accumulation before statistical confidence. Paper trading now.

next.title: Broker API Integration
next.desc: Post paper validation: Zerodha/IBKR integration. 5% initial capital. Full size only after 12mo live track record. Not before Q4 2027.

roadmap.title: Bear / Rate-Shock Strategy
roadmap.desc: No validated strategy survives prolonged bear. DUAL_MOM best candidate from 2022 data (Sh=0.82). Needs proper IS/OOS split and regime-routing integration.

roadmap.title: Straddle Paper Phase
roadmap.desc: Rate shock cleared. All gates passing. Begin paper straddle July 6, 2026 at 5% Kelly. Track 18–24 months before live capital.

roadmap.title: MOM20 OOS Validation
roadmap.desc: VIX+MOM20 Sharpe 1.08 IS. No OOS test in 2023+. Walk-forward required before adding to live system.

roadmap.title: ADX33 Signal Accumulation
roadmap.desc: Weekly directional ADX33 showing Sharpe 2.06 OOS but n=39 trades. Paper trade accumulation needed — 2–3 year horizon for statistical confidence.

roadmap.title: Live Execution
roadmap.desc: Broker API integration post paper validation. 5% initial capital. Full size only after 12mo live track record. Q4 2027 earliest.
